title: enhanced adventures
description: over 150+ quality of life mods and optimized by the best fabulously optimized
body:
built off the most popular optimization modpack fabulously optimizes makes your game runner smoother and has over 150+ quality of life and 15 resource packs some of the features are:

chunks fade in

essential mod

shield status mod for pvp

better first person

enhanced tooltips and items
